name: Salmon Mousse - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree salmon filet in a food processor.
2. Put the salmon into a stainless bowl over ice to chill and firm it up.
3. Add the egg white and whip the mixture with a spatula until smooth.
4. Adjust salt and pepper, then add 1 teaspoon Pernod, 1 teaspoon Cognac, and 1 tablespoon Caviar.
5. Mix well and pipe into a mold.
6. Reserve.
